positive: A mystical celestial journey in a geometric abstract style. The main subject is a stylized, graceful crescent moon cradling a glowing constellation of cosmic nebula dust and wandering stars. Use deep sapphire blues, vibrant teal, ethereal lavender, and pops of neon magenta. The composition should feature clean, distinct silhouettes of crystalline star formations and flowing astronomical arcs. Emphasize strong contrast between the luminous nebula dust and the deep void background. Perfect for repeating patterns or central, impactful single placement on clothing. Flat design quality, intricate linework, Art Deco influence, symmetrical radial composition, ultra-detailed, vector graphic quality, digital painting, high contrast, maximalist.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blur, blurry, artifacts, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, realistic photography, photographic, messy, grimy
